rows.label: tlk43310148_06_msg0001
rows.name:
Her Majesty Queen Lagert
ordered us to answer
Superbia's request for aid!

rows.label: tlk43310148_06_msg0002
rows.name:
I have some doubts,
but there is no time
to worry about that!

rows.label: tlk43310148_06_msg0003
rows.name:
If it is Her Majesty's
personal command, we will
do our utmost to help!

rows.label: tlk43310148_06_msg0004
rows.name:
After that, Superbia will
pay every last bit of what
it owes us!
